auth.accountVerified: You're account has been verified. You can login now!
auth.registrationError2: You are unable to register at this time due to technical issues. Please return shortly to begin your registration.
auth.subdomainMessage: Your apps can be accessed from '{domain}' until you register your own domain name

404.title: This page’s gone fishing.
404.text: If you feel that it’s not right, please send us a message at

roles.detailsDescription: Details as they are presented to users
roles.name: Name
roles.descriptionCaption: A brief explain of what the role does in the app
roles.categoryCaption1: The category is the label that this will grouped under in a dropdown when setting user permissions
roles.categoryCaption2: Users can only select one role from each category
roles.accessTypeCaption: The access type is related to the access types in the plans
roles.requiresFeatureCaption: This role will only be visible if this feature is enabled
roles.impliedRolesCaption: This is the list of roles that will actually be used by the app
roles.label: App Role Label
roles.labelCaption: The name of the role used by the app itself. Used by apps where the role is updated by the full name, not the slug. Not used by KumuliCP at all

plans.name: Name
plans.defaultPlanCaption: Checking this box will override the current default plan if another plan is set as your default
plans.adminAccessCaption: Give admins direct access to the initial admin account
plans.expiresAfterCaption: Used mainly for limited feature/limited time demos which require upgrading plans to keep active
plans.trialPeriodForCaption: How many days after the first user activates an app that they don't have to pay?
plans.enableDomainsMessage: Allow for custom domains to be used.
plans.enableDomainsCaption: Overrides the base plan if it has disabled domains
plans.connectDomainsMessage: Organizations can connect domains registered with other registrars
plans.serverTypeCaption: Separate Activation: each organization will activate their own app. Shared App: all users connect to a single app
plans.basePriceCaption: Initial price to activate app. Additional user pricing will be added on top of this
plans.productIDCaption: The ID of item in your payment processing platform (Ex: Stripe)
plans.baseStorageCaption: Initial storage required by app to be installed. This will built upon if user storage or additional
plans.standardUserPriceCaption: Increases price for organization per standard user
plans.maxUsersCaption: The maximum standard users that organizations can have permission to access this app
plans.standardUserStorageCaption: Initial storage per user. This can increase by adding additional storage
plans.basicUserNameCaption: For example, for charities, you might want to call basic users Volunteers
plans.basicUserPriceCaption: Increases price for organization per basic user
plans.maxBasicUsersCaption: The maximum basic users that organizations can have permission to access this app
plans.basicUserStorageCaption: Initial storage per user. This can increase by adding additional storage
plans.usersPerPriceCaption: Basic users are batched at a cheaper price. (Ex: 10 users per $5)
plans.additionalStoragePriceCaption: Increases price for organization per basic user
plans.maxAdditionalStorageCaption: The maximum amount of additional storage a organization can have. (If you set the storage amount below to 5GB and set the max to 5, your organizations can only have 25GB)
plans.additionalStorageQuantityCaption: The amount of GB that organizations can increment by (Ex: 5, 10, 15, 20)
plans.persistentSettingsNotice: *Persistent settings will not change once a organization activates this app without manual intervention
plans.persistentSettingMessage: If true, this value will permenantly be applied to the activated app
plans.leavePasswordBlank: Leave this blank to keep current password
plans.changeOrder: Change the order of how the plans will be displayed to users by dragging them
plans.newNameMessage: The spot in the chart that this value will be applied, seperated by a dash (-)

versions.name: Version Name
versions.disablingVersionWarning: Disabling this version will disable the app until a new version in enabled. Are you sure you want to disable this version?
versions.enablingVersionWarning: This will make this the default version for any newly activated apps. Are you sure you want to enable this version?

apps.deleteNowOrLater: When would you like to delete this app?
apps.update_modal: This will update this apps settings, which may cause temporary downtime. Are you sure you want to continue?
apps.upgrade_modal: This will upgrade the server configurations for this app, which may cause temporary downtime. Are you sure you want to continue?
apps.delete_modal: This will permenantly delete this app. Are you sure you want to continue?
apps.name: Name
apps.nameMessage: Name that will appear to organizations
apps.categoryMessage: Broad category description to users know what the primary function of this app is
apps.imageMessage: Will appear in the Discovery page with the app
apps.primaryDomainAllowedMessage: Setting is replaced by Domain option
apps.canUpdateDomainMessage: Once app is activated, can domain name be changed?
apps.domainTypeAllowedMessage: What kind of domain names are allowed
apps.parentAppMessage: Some apps require another app to be active first
apps.accessTypeMessage: Standard: full price & full access > Basic: minimal pricing & limited access > Minimal: free users for cases where they need zero admin access
apps.shortDescriptionMessage: Shows in the Discover list and should be kept brief

status.deactivating: Your organization's account will be deactivated
status.deactivated: Your organization's account is deactivated. Your controls are limited until you subscribe to a new plan

messages.unsubscribe: Are you sure you want to unsubscribe from {plan}? You can continue to use your apps until the end of the billing cycle. After this, they will be inaccessible.
messages.resubscribe: Are you sure you want to resubscribe from {plan}? You will continue to use your apps like normal and will be charged the normal amount.
messages.deactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate {app}? You can continue to use {app} until the end of the billing cycle. After this, it will be inaccessible.
messages.reactivate: Are you sure you want to reactivate {app}? You will continue using {app} like normal and will be charged.

apps.recommendPasswordChange: It's recommended you change this password when you login

setup.slugMessage: System name to identify your account. Must be lowercase and dashes only
